title: Serene Sculk
description: A re-texture for all sculk-related mobs and items.
body:
![titlelogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66196286e12467e1879f15bcd451828098817fe6.png)

<details>
<summary>Description</summary>

![mobsrender](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4c0d64dbec4bf4285e8ffd987a223a2768b5fe7.png)

  **Serene Sculk**, for **Minecraft versions 1.20-1.20.1**, made by _pexuls__, retextures all sculk-related blocks, items, and entities to fit a better style, having a simpler pallete, and shifting to be more green. 

Glowing colors become more of a teal/aquamarine, and the sculk becomes a deep navy color. 

The texture pack aims to make sculk more usable in builds with its change in colors. Enjoy!
</details>
